data.title: Gold Company to Offer Dividends in Tokenized Gold
data.description:
Elemental Royalty Corp. (TSX-V: ELE, NASDAQ: ELE) has announced a dividend policy that allows shareholders to receive payments in Tether Gold (XAUt), marking the first time a publicly listed gold company has offered dividends in a tokenized, gold-backed digital asset.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/gold-company-to-offer-dividends-in-tokenized-gold/

data.title: Incore Bank welcomes new member to its executive board
data.description:
Incore Bank AG appoints Igor Djurdjevic as its new Head of Corporate Services. He brings extensive experience in risk control to the role. The article Incore Bank welcomes new member to its executive board was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
source: https://cryptovalleyjournal.com/hot-topics/news/incore-bank-welcomes-new-member-to-its-executive-board/?utm_campaign=rss_reader&utm_medium=rss&utm_source=feed_source&utm_content=Incore+Bank+welcomes+new+member+to+its+executive+board

data.title: Machi Big Brother's High-Risk Strategy Amid $27.8 Million Losses
data.description: Machi Big Brother has continued to expand heavily leveraged long positions in various cryptocurrencies, despite facing over $27.8 million in unrealized losses. According to NS3.AI, the current positions include $13.08 million in Ethereum (ETH) at 25x leverage, $1.69 million in Bitcoin (BTC) at 40x leverage, $1.29 million in HYPE at 10x leverage, and $38,000 in VVV at 3x leverage. This aggressive strategy underscores a high-risk approach amid significant financial setbacks.

data.title: Bitcoin's tech stock divergence is a 'fire alarm' for fiat: Arthur Hayes
data.description:
Arthur Hayes warns that AI-related job losses will spark a credit crisis, forcing central banks to print money, which will drive Bitcoin to new all-time highs.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-divergence-tech-fire-alarm-fiat-system-hayes?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin Dominance Remains High, Impacting Altcoin Performance
data.description: CyrilXBT posted on X. Bitcoin dominance (BTC.D) is currently maintaining levels near 51%, indicating that capital continues to flow into Bitcoin rather than alternative cryptocurrencies. This trend suggests that as long as Bitcoin dominance remains elevated, altcoins are likely to underperform. For an altcoin season to occur, a decrease in Bitcoin dominance would be necessary.

data.title: European Central Bank President Lagarde Plans Early Departure Before Term Ends
data.description: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde is reportedly considering stepping down before her term concludes in October 2027, according to the Financial Times. According to Jin10, a source familiar with her thinking revealed that Lagarde, who transitioned from the International Monetary Fund to lead the ECB in November 2019, aims to resign before the French presidential election in April next year. The insider mentioned that Lagarde wishes to allow outgoing French President Emmanuel Macron and German Chancellor Olaf Scholz to select a new leader for one of the EU's most significant institutions. The exact timing of Lagarde's departure remains uncertain.

data.title: Bitcoin Bull Cathie Wood Says “The World is on the Brink of Deflation,” Makes Major Bullish Statements About Bitcoin
data.description:
Cathie Wood, known for her bullish statements in favor of Bitcoin, issued a deflation warning and assessed its impact on BTC. Continue Reading: Bitcoin Bull Cathie Wood Says “The World is on the Brink of Deflation,” Makes Major Bullish Statements About Bitcoin

data.title: Brother Machi adds to his long positions in ETH, HYPE, and other stocks.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, despite suffering huge losses, "Brother Machi" continues to increase and open new positions with the highest leverage. His current unrealized losses exceed $27.8 million. As of now, Brother Machi's long positions include: $13.08 million worth of ETH with 25x leverage; $1.69 million worth of BTC with 40x leverage; $1.29 million worth of HYPE with 10x leverage; and $38,000 worth of VVV with 3x leverage.

data.title: Quantonation Ventures Secures $260 Million for Physics-Based Technologies Fund
data.description: Quantum investment firm Quantonation Ventures has successfully raised $260 million for its second fund focused on physics-based technologies. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the involvement of key backers such as data center builder ACS and Novo Nordisk’s controlling shareholder. This funding round aims to support advancements in quantum computing and related fields, reflecting growing interest and investment in cutting-edge scientific innovations.

data.title: BitMine's Potential Investment in Mr. Beast Gains Attention
data.description: BitMine Chair Tom Lee posted on X about the possibility of $BMNR investing a small fraction into Mr. Beast. The idea has sparked interest and discussions among stakeholders and the broader community. The potential investment is seen as a strategic move that could enhance BitMine's market presence and diversify its portfolio. However, details regarding the investment's scale and timeline remain undisclosed.

data.title: Wells Fargo Analysts Predict YOLO Trading Surge Amid Tax Refund Season
data.description: Wells Fargo analysts anticipate a revival of the 'YOLO' (You Only Live Once) trading strategy as the U.S. tax refund season approaches. According to NS3.AI, approximately $150 billion in tax refunds is expected to enter the market by the end of March. This substantial capital influx is likely to enhance risk assets, such as Bitcoin and stock markets.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $48.6305 million yesterday, with none of the nine ETFs experiencing net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $48.6305 million yesterday (February 17th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net inflow of $22.8947 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $12 billion. This was followed by Fidelity ETF FETH, with a net inflow of $14.4129 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $2.488 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs was $11.467 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.76%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $11.697 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $105 million yesterday, with Grayscale BTC leading the way with a net inflow of $35.9735 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $105 million yesterday (February 17th, Eastern Time). The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF (BTC), with a net inflow of $35.9735 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $2.086 billion. This was followed by the Fidelity ETF (FBTC), with a net inflow of $5.8937 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $10.988 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (IBIT), with a net outflow of $120 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $61.487 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $85.52 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) is 6.31%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $54.224 billion.

data.title: Yesterday, US Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a net outflow of $104.9 million.
data.description: According to Farside monitoring, US Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a net outflow of $104.9 million yesterday, with BlackRock IBIT experiencing a net outflow of $119.7 million and Grayscale BTC seeing a net inflow of $36 million.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs See Inflows Over $48M
data.description: U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs experienced net inflows of $48.61 million on February 17, marking the second consecutive day of gains. According to NS3.AI, significant inflows were observed in BlackRock's ETHA, Fidelity's FETH, and Grayscale's Mini ETH ETFs. This trend underscores increasing investor interest in gaining Ethereum exposure through regulated financial products.

data.title: AI agent startup Temporal completes $300 million Series D funding round at a $5 billion valuation, led by a16z.
data.description: AI agent startup Temporal announced the completion of a $300 million Series D funding round at a $5 billion valuation. The round was led by Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), with participation from Lightspeed Venture Partners, Sapphire Ventures, and Sequoia Capital. OpenAI, Snap, Netflix, and JPMorgan Chase are among its clients. The company stated that this funding round was not "chasing the AI ​​hype," but rather aimed at building a platform to address the reliability challenges commonly faced by AI agents in complex, long-running processes. (Reuters)

data.title: Stripe’s Bridge Secures Conditional OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
data.description:
The Stripe-owned stablecoin infrastructure company Bridge has received conditional approval from the U. S. OCC to form a national trust bank.

The post Stripe’s Bridge Secures Conditional OCC Approval for National Trust Bank first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2026/02/18/stripe-bridge-secures-occ-approval/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=stripe-bridge-secures-occ-approval

data.title: BitGo Emerges as Takeover Target After IPO Slide
data.description:
Wall Street analysts are increasingly positioning BitGo Holdings (NYSE: BTGO) as a potential acquisition candidate for major financial institutions, following its public debut and expansion into full-service institutional crypto infrastructure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitgo-emerges-as-takeover-target-after-ipo-slide/
